prompt: 헤이딜러(PRND) AI Engineer 포지션 지원동기를 작성해 주세요. 1000자 이내.

assertions.text: Answer is 1000 characters or fewer (including spaces)
Answer is primarily in Korean (>30% Korean characters)
Uses 존댓말 consistently (sentences end with 습니다/입니다/했습니다/됩니다)
No explicit STAR headers (상황/과제/행동/결과 or Situation/Task/Action/Result as standalone labels)
Contains at least 2 specific metrics from CV (numbers like 20%, 10%, 6개, 15개, 10만건 etc.)
Mentions PRND or 헤이딜러 at least once, connecting candidate experience to company mission
Avoids Korean 자소서 cliches (어릴 때부터, 열정적이고, 급변하는 시대, 4차 산업혁명)
